title: CrabLaw-CN Compliance Deadline
description: A structured, re-checkable compliance or contractual obligation with a due date. The compliance-deadline-watcher skill reads these records (never re-parses prose) so the watch is deterministic and cannot drift or hallucinate dates.

obligationType.description: Neutral, PRC-rooted obligation categories. data-export-reassessment=数据出境评估复评; pip-compliance-audit=个人信息保护合规审计; mlps-renewal=网络安全等级保护测评续期; security-assessment-refile=安全评估重新申报; contract-renewal=合同续签; contract-expiry=合同到期; regulatory-filing=监管备案/申报; license-renewal=资质/许可续期; litigation-deadline=诉讼/仲裁期限; retention-expiry=资料留存到期; other=其他

basis.description: Legal or contractual basis for the deadline (statute/clause/agency notice).

sourceRef.description: Pointer to the governing source; required when citationTag is [已核验-来源].

leadTimeDays.description: How many days before dueDate the watcher should start surfacing this item.

recurrenceMonths.description: For recurring obligations, the interval; the watcher proposes the next dueDate after completion. Omit for one-shot deadlines.
